word: G1847 - ἐξουδενόω - exoudenóō - ex-oo-den-o'-o - Set at nought

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Set at nought
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to treat with contempt, to despise; to reject
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G1537 and a derivative of the neuter of G3762; to make utterly nothing of, that is, despise: - set at nought. See also G1848.
